summary: Frontend testing iteration 5 - All requested fixes verified working. Map alignment improved with zoom controls, Festival map color-coded with proper month groupings, Greenland shows orange (visa_required) not grey, Thailand shows 'BEST TIME NOW' in modal, Country flags accurate using iso3ToIso2 mapping, Safety & Forex info added to country detail modal.

issues: Console warning about duplicate keys (THA, JPN) - non-critical but should be fixed for cleaner code

passed_tests: Map zoom controls (+, -, reset) work on all map pages (Seasons, Visa, Festivals)
Map fills container better with increased scale (260) and dimensions (1400x700)
Festival map is color-coded: Red=Many (3+), Orange=Some (2), Blue=Few (1)
Festival list properly grouped by month: January (13), February (11), etc.
No 'Unknown' month category - normalizeMonth function correctly converts 'January'/1/'Jan' to number
'Various' category exists only for multi-month festivals (acceptable)
Greenland shows 'Visa Required' status with orange indicator (not grey)
Greenland shows in visa country list: 'Danish/Schengen visa required'
194 visa country cards loaded on Visa page
Thailand modal shows 'BEST TIME NOW' (green) since March is in best_months
Thailand best_months displayed: Nov, Dec, Jan, Feb, Mar
Thailand flag URL correct: https://flagcdn.com/w80/th.png
Thailand country card flag correct: https://flagcdn.com/w40/th.png
Japan flag URL correct: https://flagcdn.com/w80/jp.png
iso3ToIso2 mapping working correctly for flag display
Thailand modal shows Safety & Emergency section with Police (191), Ambulance (1669), Fire (199)
Japan modal shows Safety & Emergency section with Police (110), Ambulance/Fire (119)
Thailand modal shows Exchange Rate section with Thai Baht (THB)
Japan modal shows Exchange Rate section with Japanese Yen (JPY)
Thailand modal shows festivals: Songkran (Apr), Loi Krathong (Nov)
Thailand modal shows dishes: Pad Thai, Tom Yum, Green Curry, Mango Sticky Rice
Japan modal shows festivals: Sapporo Snow Festival, Cherry Blossom Festival, Awa Odori
Japan modal shows dishes: Sushi, Ramen, Tempura, Mochi with descriptions
117 festivals displayed on Festivals page
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for THA, JPN - likely duplicate key in country cards mapping. Should use unique key (e.g., `${country.country_code}-${idx}`).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested fixes verified: (1) Map zoom controls work (+, -, reset), map fills container better. (2) Festival map color-coded correctly, month groupings work with normalizeMonth(). (3) Greenland shows orange (visa_required) not grey. (4) Thailand modal shows 'BEST TIME NOW' when current month in best_months. (5) Country flags use iso3ToIso2 mapping for correct display. (6) Safety & Forex sections added to CountryDetailModal. Minor: duplicate key console warnings for THA/JPN/PHL should be addressed.

features_verified.map_alignment: Map scale=260, width=1400, height=700, ZoomableGroup with zoom controls
features_verified.month_grouping: normalizeMonth() converts January/1/Jan to number for proper grouping
features_verified.greenland_visa: Shows 'Visa Required' with orange color, not grey
features_verified.thailand_season: Shows 'BEST TIME NOW' when current month in best_months array
features_verified.country_flags: iso3ToIso2 mapping for accurate flag URLs
features_verified.forex_section: Exchange rate with currency code displayed
